privileged_info_summary: C&W Construction is a verified business partner in iDempiere's standard GardenWorld demo database. All other task metadata values are task-specific synthetic data: product key (SVC-GARDEN-001), product name (Premium Garden Care), subscription type name (Monthly Care Plan), subscription name (C&W HQ Maintenance 2025), and test dates (2025-01-01 and 2025-02-01) are all created as part of this task execution. No real customer data, financial data, or sensitive information is involved. The task uses the public GardenWorld demo environment which is the standard testing database included with iDempiere.
